Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Apr-09-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for petitioner Fatima Mbarki, the Guardian Ad Litem for the minor, Hanan Nuriddin. Neither the Guardian Ad Litem nor the minor were present at today's hearing.
Order waiving witness appearance at the minor's compromise hearing was filed on April 6, 2009.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $29,439.53.
Attorney's Fees - $7,269.26.
Costs - $362.49.

A net balance of $21,807.78 shall be deposited into a blocked account with the Washington State Employee Credit Union, Post Office Box WSECU, Olympia, WA 98507. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Furthermore, future settlements from defendants in this action may be distributed in accordance with the terms set forth in Attachment 12 of the Orders Approving the Compromises, without further Order of the Court.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
